race.description: Kalgoorlie Punters & Drinkers Club Sprint Handicap (Bm70+)
race.comment: STORM COMMANDER (4) got the job done here two back before dropping to 1100m last time out and just missing. Getting back out to this trip looks ideal and he should get every chance from the inside alley. Drops slightly in weight here and he can get back to winning ways. FALSE STATEMENT (5) flew home to score at Geraldton last time out and has been kept fresh for this event. He has never missed the placings at this track and trip and he rates highly on his recent performances. Likely to get back in the run but he can be flying home from the back. DOTHRAKI (3) went out to 1400m last time out, missing by 0.6L. Back to 1200m now is a good move and he maps beautifully today. Will handle the quick turnaround and he can go one better. HILTON (1) was only 0.4L off DOTHRAKI at his latest effort and he can feature in the finish once again. TACITO (6) has to be included on his recent form.
